## Out of scope

## Definition of Done (DoD)
- [ ] All Feature sub-issues done and meet their acceptance criteria
- [ ] CI green on default branch
- [ ] Release notes / changelog entry written (if milestone/release)
- [ ] Docs updated (README / ADR) if architecture or workflow changed
